human_verification.notes: Reviewed Issue #1312 requirements for financial-services-specific evidence handling, research coverage, scenario completeness, boundary controls, and validated packaging consistency.

review_notes: All required abilities across shared, revenue-billing-and-financial-reconciliation, and financial-services-and-insurance sets are declared and validated.
Scenario coverage includes missing evidence, unsupported overrides, reconciliation mismatches, fraud or AML escalation, source conflicts, and tenant adaptation handling.
Package remains specification-based and documents a separate promotion path for any future retained-implementation runtime.

specialist_owned_evidence: Outputs are bounded to evidence-backed billing, posting, reconciliation, control, and escalation handling rather than final legal or approval authority.
Source set includes consumer-protection, servicing, AML, insurance-claims, and reconciliation references with explicit refresh and decay posture.
Boundary logic explicitly prevents unsupported overrides, fabricated approvals, and unreviewed fraud or consumer-impact handling.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; non-blocking ambiguities are recorded as tenant and jurisdiction prerequisites.
Runtime remains `specification-based`; retained-implementation promotion requires separate governance approval, telemetry evidence, and non-regression validation.
